TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Taywan (Conxwa Minkoku) hya' ga cyux maki' tay 23 30 N, 121 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 35,980 sq km (maki' tay 139ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 32,260 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 3,720 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 23,464,787. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 22.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga NA, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 77.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Taype'. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 10 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Lai Ching-te, aring ryax 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: tajwan ( ¶~ ®onxwa minkoku) ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a na, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a tajpe Ē. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a lai ¶~ ®ńßiŇč-te, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Taywan (Conxwa Minkoku) hya' ga cyux maki' tay 23 30 N, 121 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 35,980 sq km (maki' tay 139ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 32,260 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 3,720 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 23,464,787. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 22.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga NA, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 77.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Taype'. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 10 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Lai Ching-te, aring ryax 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: tajwan ( ¶~ ®onxwa minkoku) ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a na, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a tajpe Ē. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a lai ¶~ ®ńßiŇč-te, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
